metadata.title: About AFSECMO | Industrial Services Partner in Côte d'Ivoire
metadata.description: Learn about AFSECMO Group, an Abidjan-based industrial services partner supporting mining, oil & gas, construction, procurement, logistics and field operations.

hero.description:
AFSECMO Group is an Abidjan-based industrial services partner supporting mining, oil & gas, construction, procurement, import-export, equipment mobilisation, logistics and field operations across Côte d'Ivoire and West Africa.

We help operators secure critical materials, coordinate reliable suppliers, mobilise equipment, support technical works and maintain productive industrial sites through disciplined execution, responsive communication and HSE-focused project coordination.

section.title: Engineering and procurement for heavy industry.

activities.title: Strategic Procurement & Import-Export
activities.copy: Acting as a dedicated central purchasing partner, AFSECMO sources industrial equipment, spare parts, consumables, safety materials and project supplies through vetted supplier networks. We coordinate technical validation, quotation follow-up, import-export documentation and delivery planning to keep critical operations supplied.

activities.title: Oil, Gas & Energy Support
activities.copy: AFSECMO supports oil, gas and energy projects with technical procurement, equipment mobilisation, industrial materials supply, maintenance coordination and field logistics. From storage facilities and downstream infrastructure to operational bases, we help energy teams secure reliable supplies, compliant documentation and responsive site support.
activities.imageAlt: Oil and gas storage and energy infrastructure support

activities.title: Construction & BTP Support
activities.copy: AFSECMO coordinates civil works, site preparation, renovation, utilities, materials supply and subcontractor support for industrial, commercial and operational facilities. Our approach combines practical field execution, disciplined procurement and clear project reporting.

activities.title: Mechanical & Industrial Maintenance
activities.copy: AFSECMO supports industrial facilities with mechanical maintenance, equipment servicing, electrical and plumbing utilities, spare parts sourcing and intervention planning. We help clients reduce downtime, protect operational continuity and maintain reliable site performance.

metadata.title: AFSECMO Services | Procurement, Logistics, Construction & Maintenance
metadata.description: Explore AFSECMO services including technical procurement, import-export, equipment rental, logistics, construction support, utilities and industrial maintenance.

hero.description: AFSECMO delivers industrial support from technical procurement and import-export coordination to logistics, equipment mobilisation, maintenance, construction support and facility operations. We work with mining, energy, construction and infrastructure teams that need reliable execution, responsive coordination and transparent documentation across West Africa.

title: Mining & Quarry
Support
items.desc: Operational support for mining and quarry sites, including equipment sourcing, spare parts, safety materials, aggregates, fleet coordination and field logistics. AFSECMO helps extraction teams reduce delays and keep production environments supplied.

title: Oil & Gas
Services
items.desc: Technical procurement, equipment mobilisation and maintenance coordination for upstream, downstream, storage, energy and utility infrastructure. We support critical operations with vetted suppliers, site-ready materials and disciplined project follow-up.

title: Engineering &
Construction
items.desc: Support for civil works, site preparation, industrial buildings, utilities, renovation projects and infrastructure delivery. AFSECMO coordinates materials, equipment, subcontractors and documentation to keep works moving safely and efficiently.

title: Mechanical &
Industrial Maintenance
items.desc: Maintenance support for mechanical systems, industrial equipment, workshops and production environments. We help clients plan interventions, mobilise resources, source spare parts and protect operational continuity.

title: Electrical, Plumbing
& Utilities
items.desc: Installation and maintenance support for electrical networks, plumbing systems, water supply, drainage, lighting and utility assets across camps, warehouses, offices and industrial facilities.

title: Central Purchasing
& Import-Export
items.desc: Dedicated purchasing support for companies requiring reliable access to industrial materials, equipment, spare parts and consumables. We manage sourcing, supplier coordination, technical validation, import-export documentation and delivery follow-up.

title: Equipment Rental
& Fleet Support
items.desc: Flexible mobilisation of vehicles, machinery, handling equipment and site support assets. AFSECMO assists with rental coordination, mobilisation planning, fleet availability and practical field support.

title: Logistics &
Project Mobilisation
items.desc: End-to-end coordination for moving materials, equipment and teams from suppliers to operational sites. Our support can include transport planning, consolidation, import-export assistance, delivery tracking and site readiness.

title: Facility &
Asset Support
items.desc: Operational support for camps, yards, workshops, offices, warehouses and industrial assets, including maintenance coordination, utilities, cleaning, inspections and service management.

cta.heading: Ready to mobilise your next operation?
cta.description: Share your requirements with AFSECMO and our team will coordinate the right procurement, logistics, equipment, technical or field-support solution for your project.

hero.description: A focused view of how AFSECMO supports mining, oil & gas, construction, procurement, logistics, maintenance and facility operations through practical field coordination, reliable sourcing and project-ready mobilisation.

items.title: Mining Site Support
items.scope: Equipment sourcing, field logistics, operational supplies, maintenance coordination and technical support for mining and quarry operators.

items.title: Oil & Gas Field Services
items.scope: Procurement, equipment rental, industrial maintenance, logistics and site coordination for energy, storage, upstream and downstream operations.

items.title: Industrial Procurement
items.scope: Sourcing and supply of technical equipment, spare parts, tools, construction materials, electrical supplies, mechanical parts and safety equipment.

items.title: Construction & BTP Support
items.scope: Civil works, site preparation, materials supply, manpower coordination, utilities support and project execution assistance.

items.title: Equipment Rental & Fleet Support
items.scope: Rental coordination and mobilisation of industrial equipment, vehicles, machinery and site-support assets for project operations.

items.title: Industrial Maintenance
items.scope: Mechanical, electrical, plumbing and technical maintenance support for industrial sites, facilities, workshops and operational bases.

items.title: Logistics & Mobilisation
items.scope: Transport coordination, site delivery, import-export assistance and supply-chain support for projects across Côte d'Ivoire and West Africa.

items.title: Facility & Operational Support
items.scope: General site services, cleaning, maintenance, utilities support, workforce facilities and operational assistance for camps, yards, offices and warehouses.

hero.subtitle: // A clear process from request to site execution
hero.description: For each project, AFSECMO follows a disciplined workflow designed to clarify requirements, validate suppliers, plan mobilisation, control field execution and maintain transparent communication from request to after-service support.

phases.title: Requirement review
phases.desc: We define the client need, operating context, timeframe, specifications and required documentation through rigorous collaborative assessment.

phases.title: Sourcing & technical validation
phases.desc: We compare suppliers, equipment options, delivery constraints, quality requirements and commercial conditions to minimise risk.

phases.title: Mobilisation planning
phases.desc: We coordinate personnel, equipment, transport, site access, safety preparation and logistics readiness for seamless deployments.

phases.title: Execution & reporting
phases.desc: We support field delivery with proactive follow-up, issue resolution, documentation and continuous status communication.

phases.title: After-service support
phases.desc: We assist with long-term maintenance needs, reorders, supplier warranties and recurring operational requirements post-completion.

hero.description: AFSECMO applies disciplined coordination standards across sourcing, mobilisation, site support and after-service follow-up. Our approach is built around safety awareness, supplier reliability, documentation control and transparent communication throughout the project lifecycle.

standards.title: HSE-Focused Planning
standards.copy: Work planning aligned with safe site access, PPE requirements, operational constraints and responsible field conduct.

standards.title: Supplier & Contractor Vetting
standards.copy: Selection of suppliers and subcontractors based on capability, availability, traceability and compliance readiness.

standards.title: Documentation Control
standards.copy: Clear quotations, technical references, delivery notes, service records and follow-up reports to support auditability.

standards.title: Operational Transparency
standards.copy: Regular updates on timelines, constraints, delivery status and project milestones so clients remain informed at every stage.

hero.titleLead: Build your career with an industrial services team
hero.description: AFSECMO welcomes professionals who can contribute to procurement, logistics, technical services, construction support, maintenance, administration and commercial coordination for demanding industrial projects.

why.title: Why join AFSECMO
why.copy: AFSECMO is expanding its operational, commercial, procurement and technical teams to support industrial projects with practical execution and reliable coordination.

standards.title: Hiring standards
standards.copy: AFSECMO does not request payment, recruitment fees, or processing fees from applicants at any stage of the hiring process.

contact.title: Use the dedicated recruitment inbox for opportunities and follow-up.

metadata.title: Contact AFSECMO | Request a Quotation or Project Support
metadata.description: Contact AFSECMO in Abidjan for procurement, logistics, equipment rental, oil & gas services, mining support, construction and industrial maintenance inquiries.

details.label: Contact Details
details.title: Reach the AFSECMO team.
details.description: Send your project requirement, quotation request or operational-support inquiry. Our team will review your scope, location, timeline and technical needs before coordinating the appropriate procurement, logistics, equipment or field-support response.
details.office: Centre Clarice, Zone 4, Abidjan, Côte d’Ivoire
